docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,294.36 FILED BY KHETRAPAL, SAURABH AS TO DEFENDANT VARMA, MANISH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-15-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-17-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VARMA, MANISH
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-15-2012 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KHETRAPAL, SAURABH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VARMA, MANISH $7,294.36 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,444.36, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHETRAPAL, SAURABH AS TO DEFENDANT VARMA, MANISH
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT VARMA, MANISH
REMARK: FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON MAY 29, 2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
